sheets.name: VIP Lead Intelligence
data: Philippines Upper-Echelon VIP Lead Intelligence — 100 Approachable Public/Business Routes

Focus: senators, congressmen, mayors, vice mayors, and business owners/decision-makers connected to hotels, restaurants, hospitality, premium residences, clinics, and commercial interiors. Excludes president-level and ultra-inaccessible figures as primary targets.
Why This Lead Fits Erwin Ereno Home Builders
Makati is one of the strongest commercial/VIP-client areas in the Philippines with corporate, residential, hospitality and restaurant demand.

sheets.name: Outreach Routes
data: Outreach Routes — Use Public, Approachable Channels Only
City projects, VIP local-business introductions, civic interiors, public-facing facilities
Official mayor/vice mayor office email or city hall contact; attach short company profile and sample visuals
Do not ask for private number; do not imply political favor
District-level introductions, city/province business ecosystem, formal network building
House profile route / district office / official email / public staff route
Do not pitch like a casual influencer DM
Official Senate office channels only; send capability deck, not long Excel first
Do not expect direct senator reply; staff response is normal
Hotel-owner introductions, renovation leads, hospitality design routes
PHOA/HRAP-type association route, tourism/hotel investment events
Industry language: guest experience, ROI, brand identity
Do not ask for member private contacts without relationship
Model units, sales galleries, lobbies, amenities, hospitality assets
Business development, procurement, partnerships, investor relations
Do not target only chairman; find BD/procurement staff
Restaurant concept, branch refresh, brand rollout, ad visuals
Official company email, LinkedIn founder/operator, brand partnership route
Do not send generic design message
Luxury reception, treatment rooms, content-ready clinic spaces
Clinic business inquiry / brand partnership / official social route
Do not pitch like medical service; pitch space experience
Warm introductions to private residences, events, luxury spaces
Business manager, official social/business inquiry only
Do not chase private personal info

sheets.name: Use Notes
data: This workbook intentionally removes president/vice-president level figures and ultra-inaccessible billionaire-family principals as primary targets.
Every row is a named person or named office route with a public-facing channel; no private scraped phone numbers are included.
The best first outreach targets are A++, A+, and A rows with High or Medium-High access level.

For politicians, the correct pitch is not 'hire us personally'. The correct pitch is formal capability introduction, city/tourism/business-development relevance, and a request for the right office/person to speak with.

For hotels, restaurants, developers, and clinics, the pitch can be more direct: design-build support, hospitality interiors, content-ready spaces, AI visual samples, concept mockups, and presentation visuals.
Before sending to the client, frame it as a high-targetability public-route lead intelligence sheet, not a private-contact database.
